common.comingSoon: This area is part of the next milestone.

landing.title: A clearer way to buy and sell property in the UAE.
landing.subtitle: Transparent information. Guided processes. Confidence from listing to handover.
landing.pointBrowseBody: Search listings, compare investment data, save favourites, and make non-binding offers.
landing.pointListBody: Create a listing, complete the demo verification steps, publish, and manage offers.
landing.pointSecureBody: Email and password sign-in, in-country data, and server-enforced access control.
landing.featuredBody: Explore recently published MARKAZ listings and selected external properties.
landing.featuredExternalNotice: External listings are supplied by an unaffiliated third-party API and open on Bayut.

signup.title: Create your MARKAZ account
signup.description: One account lets you browse properties, make offers, list a property, and track transactions.
signup.terms: I agree to the Terms of Use.
signup.privacy: I agree to the Privacy Policy.
signup.security: Your account details are protected using secure authentication.

password.incomplete: Does not yet meet the requirements
password.unique: Use a unique password that you do not use on other services.

verify.sentCode: We sent a six-digit verification code to {email}.
verify.checkEmailBody: Enter the code to verify your email and continue setting up your account.
verify.title: Verify your email
verify.description: Enter the six-digit code sent to {email}.
verify.help: Codes can take a few minutes to arrive. Check your spam or junk folder.
verify.resent: A new verification code has been sent.
verify.successBody: Your email is confirmed. Next, complete the demo identity step.

signin.title: Welcome back
signin.description: Sign in to manage your properties, offers, and transactions.
signin.security: MARKAZ will never ask for your password by email.
signin.incorrect: The email or password is incorrect.
signin.verifyBody: Your account setup is not complete. Enter the verification code sent to your email.

forgot.title: Reset your password
forgot.description: Enter the email address for your MARKAZ account.
forgot.security: For your security, we will not confirm whether an account exists for this email.
forgot.sentBody: If an account exists for this email, password recovery instructions have been sent.
forgot.sentHelp: Open the recovery link in the email to choose a new password. Check your spam or junk folder if it does not arrive.

reset.title: Choose a new password
reset.description: Create a password you have not used for this account before.
reset.invalidTitle: This password reset link is no longer valid
reset.invalidBody: The link may have expired or already been used. Request a new recovery email to continue.
reset.successBody: Your password has been changed. Sign in with your new password.

profile.title: Complete your profile
profile.descriptionOne: We are missing a required account detail. Complete it to continue.
profile.descriptionMany: We are missing a few required account details. Complete them to continue.
profile.reassurance: We only ask for information needed to set up your MARKAZ account.

identity.disclosureBody: This prototype is not connected to the live UAE PASS service.
identity.introTitle: Verify your identity for this demo
identity.introBody: This prototype includes a simulated identity step so you can experience the complete MARKAZ onboarding journey.
identity.pendingBody: Your demo identity check has started. Use the simulation controls below to choose the result.
identity.controlsBody: These controls are available only in the prototype and do not connect to UAE PASS.
identity.successBody: Your account setup is complete. You can now browse properties, make offers, and list a property.
identity.failureBody: No official identity check was performed. Try the simulation again to continue.

session.expiredBody: For your security, please sign in again. We will return you to a safe page where possible.

error.providerBody: We cannot connect to the authentication service right now. Your non-sensitive progress has been preserved.
error.genericBody: We could not complete this request. Try again.
error.marketplaceBody: We could not load the marketplace. Try again shortly.
error.propertyTitle: This property is no longer available
error.propertyBody: It may have been paused or removed from the MARKAZ marketplace.
error.nextPage: We could not load the next page. Try again.
error.filter: We could not update the results. Try again.

validation.fullNameTooLong: Full name must be 100 characters or fewer.
validation.existingAccount: We could not create a new account with these details. You may already have an account. Try signing in or resetting your password.
validation.uppercaseMissing: Add at least one uppercase letter.
validation.lowercaseMissing: Add at least one lowercase letter.
validation.specialMissing: Add at least one special character.
validation.passwordTooLong: Password must be 128 characters or fewer.
validation.termsRequired: Accept the Terms of Use to create an account.
validation.privacyRequired: Accept the Privacy Policy to create an account.
validation.incorrectCredentials: The email or password is incorrect.
validation.codeInvalid: That code is not correct. Check the six digits and try again.
validation.codeExpired: This code has expired. Request a new code to continue.
validation.codeTooManyAttempts: Too many unsuccessful attempts. Request a new code to continue.
validation.rateLimited: Too many requests. Please wait {time} before trying again.
validation.providerUnavailable: The authentication service is temporarily unavailable. Try again shortly.
validation.accountUnavailable: We cannot sign you in to this account right now. Contact MARKAZ support if you believe this is a mistake.
validation.invalidRecoverySession: This password reset link is no longer valid.
validation.expiredRecoverySession: The link may have expired or already been used. Request a new recovery email to continue.
validation.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Sign in again to continue.
validation.adminAccessDenied: This account does not have permission to access MARKAZ Operations.
validation.unexpectedError: We could not complete this request. Try again.
validation.passwordPolicy: Your password does not meet all requirements.

uaePass.title: Verify your identity
uaePass.disclosure: Demo simulation only. This prototype is not connected to the live UAE PASS service.
uaePass.notStartedBody: Run a quick simulated identity check to continue.
uaePass.pendingBody: Your simulated identity check is in progress.
uaePass.successBody: You're all set. Continuing to your dashboard.
uaePass.failedBody: The simulated check did not pass. You can try again.
uaePass.testEnvNote: Test environment — no production identity verification was performed. UAE PASS confirms identity only; it does not verify property ownership.
uaePass.error: UAE PASS staging authentication could not be completed. Please try again, or sign in with your email and password.
uaePass.cancelled: UAE PASS staging authentication was cancelled. You can try again or sign in with email and password.

dashboard.subtitle: Browse properties or list your own — your account does both.
dashboard.browseBody: Search properties, compare available investment data, save listings, make offers, and track your purchase.
dashboard.listBody: Create a property listing, complete the required demo verification steps, publish, and manage offers.
dashboard.emptySaved: You haven't saved any properties yet.
dashboard.emptyListings: You don't have any listings yet.
dashboard.emptyOffersMade: You haven't made any offers yet.
dashboard.summariesPartialError: Some activity couldn't be loaded. Showing what we have.

placeholders.browseBody: The public marketplace, search, and property detail pages arrive in the next milestone.
placeholders.myListingsBody: The full listing wizard and management tools arrive in the next milestone.
placeholders.offersBody: Made and received offers, counters, and the Low Offers split arrive next.
placeholders.transactionsBody: The shared transaction tracker arrives in the next milestone.
placeholders.helpBody: Help and support content will appear here.

realtimeProof.title: Realtime proof
realtimeProof.body: Open this page in two windows. Press the button in one and watch the counter update in the other without a refresh.
realtimeProof.note: Technical proof only — Supabase Realtime connects directly to the database (never behind a pooler).

storageProof.title: Storage boundary proof
storageProof.body: Private ownership documents are reachable only via short-lived signed URLs; listing photos are public.
storageProof.deniedLabel: Direct public access to a private object is denied.

admin.loginSubtitle: Operations portal. Sign in with your email and password.
admin.accessDeniedBody: This portal is for MARKAZ administrators only. Your account doesn't have access.
admin.sectionPlaceholder: This admin section is part of a later milestone.
admin.signinBody: Use your authorised MARKAZ Admin account.
admin.security: Access is restricted to authorised MARKAZ personnel.
admin.forgotBody: Enter the email address for your authorised MARKAZ Admin account.
admin.resetBody: Create a secure password for your MARKAZ Operations account.
admin.deniedBody: This account does not have permission to access MARKAZ Operations.
admin.deniedHelp: Sign out and use an authorised Admin account.
admin.expiredBody: For security, sign in again to continue using MARKAZ Operations.
admin.signedOutTitle: You are signed out of MARKAZ Operations
admin.simulatedHint: Regulated integrations are simulated in this environment.

overview.title: Operational overview
overview.description: Live operational metrics and queues that need attention.
overview.partialError: Some operational information could not be loaded.

customers.title: Customers
customers.description: Every customer account. Emails are partially masked.
customers.unavailable: This customer record is not available.
customers.attention: Restricted while holding an active transaction.

restrict.title: Restrict customer actions
restrict.body: The customer can still sign in and browse, but cannot create offers, listings, or publish while restricted. This is recorded in the audit log.

restore.title: Restore customer actions
restore.body: The customer regains the ability to create offers, listings, and publish. This is recorded in the audit log.

note.title: Admin notes
note.subtitle: Internal only. Never visible to customers.
note.privacyWarning: Notes are internal operational records — do not paste customer secrets or document contents.

pause.title: Pause listing availability
pause.body: The listing is removed from the public marketplace and the owner is notified. This is recorded in the audit log.

resume.title: Resume listing availability
resume.body: The listing returns to the public marketplace if it remains eligible. This is recorded in the audit log.

publication.title: Publication review
publication.empty: No publication reviews in this queue.
publication.unavailable: This publication review is not available.

approve.title: Approve publication
approve.body: The listing is published to the public marketplace using the standard compensated workflow. This is recorded in the audit log.

return.title: Return for changes
return.body: The request is returned to the owner with the selected reason. The owner is notified and can resubmit.

retry.title: Retry verification
retry.body: A new simulated verification attempt is created. The previous attempt is preserved. This is recorded in the audit log.

adminOffers.title: Offers
adminOffers.description: Offer threads across the marketplace. Read-only history.
adminOffers.proposalsHint: Immutable. Admins cannot alter proposal amounts.

close.title: Close offer thread
close.body: Closing an invalid thread is an operational data-repair action. It does not change any proposal amounts or the accepted offer. This is recorded in the audit log.

adminTransactions.title: Transactions
adminTransactions.description: Simulated transaction workspaces. Recovery actions only.

pause.title: Pause transaction progression
pause.body: Both participants keep read access, but no milestone can advance while paused. This is recorded in the audit log.

resume.title: Resume transaction progression
resume.body: Milestones can advance again. This is recorded in the audit log.

retryStep.title: Retry system step
retryStep.body: Re-runs a retry-safe simulated step. Only steps that failed due to a transient simulated error can be retried.

markFailed.title: Mark transaction failed
markFailed.body: This is irreversible. Use only when the transaction cannot recover. Both participants are notified. This is recorded in the audit log.

resolveCancellation.title: Resolve cancellation request
resolveCancellation.body: Choose how to resolve the pending cancellation. This is recorded in the audit log.

document.title: Private documents
document.subtitle: Metadata only. Opening a document is audited.
document.linkFailed: The secure document link could not be prepared. Try again.

access.title: Open private document
access.body: You are about to open a private customer document. Access is recorded in the audit log with your reason. Do not download or share the contents.
access.confirmLabel: I am accessing this for a legitimate operational reason.
access.opened: Document opened in a new tab. The secure link expires in {seconds} seconds.

audit.title: Audit log
audit.description: Immutable record of admin and system actions.
audit.empty: No audit events match these filters.
audit.unavailable: This audit event is not available.

realtime.stale: This view may be out of date.

result.success: Done. This action was recorded in the audit log.
result.failure: That action could not be completed.

error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
error.stale: This record changed before your action completed. Refresh and try again.
error.permission: You do not have permission for this action.

permission.title: Not permitted
permission.body: Your admin account does not include the capability required for this area.

accessDenied.title: Access denied
accessDenied.body: This portal is for authorised operations staff only.

states.emptyBody: There's nothing to show right now.
states.errorBody: We hit a problem. Please try again.

authPanel.title: One account. Every property journey.
authPanel.subtitle: Browse, make offers, list your property, and follow each step in one place.

listing.myDescription: Create and manage the properties you want to list on MARKAZ.
listing.emptyBody: Add the property details, complete the demo verification steps, upload photographs, and prepare your listing for publication.
listing.emptySupporting: You can save your progress and return at any time.
listing.deleteBody: This will permanently remove the draft, its fictional ownership document, uploaded photographs, and saved listing information. This action cannot be undone.
listing.resumeBody: You already started a property listing. Continue where you left off or create another draft.
listing.unavailableBody: It may have been removed, or you may not have access to it.

details.title: Tell us about the property
details.description: Start with the essential information buyers will use to understand the property. You can return and update these details before publication.
details.emirateHelp: This prototype currently supports residential property listings in Dubai.
details.communityPlaceholder: Search for an area, such as Dubai Marina
details.communityHelp: Choose the community buyers are most likely to recognise.
details.buildingPlaceholder: Enter the building or project name
details.buildingHelpOptional: Optional if the property is identified by its community and villa number.
details.unitHelp: Kept private. This helps connect your fictional sample document to the listing.
details.sizeHelp: Enter the internal property area shown in your fictional sample document.
details.occupancyHelp: This information is kept private during this prototype milestone.
details.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the layout, condition, views, natural light, recent improvements, and what makes the property distinctive.
details.descriptionHelp: Use clear factual language. Do not include phone numbers, email addresses, or unsupported claims.

err.emirate: This prototype currently supports Dubai listings.
err.building: Enter the building or project name.
err.unit: Enter a private unit or property identifier.
err.size: Enter a property size between 200 and 50,000 sq ft.
err.descriptionShort: Add at least 80 characters describing the property.
err.descriptionLong: Description must be 2,000 characters or fewer.
err.amenities: Choose up to 15 features and amenities.
err.generic: We could not save your changes. Check the highlighted fields and try again.

ownership.title: Add a fictional ownership document
ownership.description: Choose the document type and upload one fictional sample file for the simulated ownership check.
ownership.safetyTitle: Use a fictional sample document only
ownership.safetyBody: For this prototype, use a fictional sample document only. Do not upload a real Title Deed, Oqood, Emirates ID, passport, or other sensitive document.
ownership.titleDeedHelp: For a completed property with a fictional title document.
ownership.oqoodHelp: For an off-plan property with a fictional registration document.
ownership.privateBody: This file is visible only to you and authorised MARKAZ Operations users. It will not appear on the public listing or listing preview. The check is simulated and does not connect to official property or government records.
ownership.uploadCta: Drag a fictional sample file here, or choose a file
ownership.uploadHint: PDF, JPG or PNG · Maximum 10 MB
ownership.removeBody: The listing cannot continue without an ownership document. Any simulated verification result will also be reset.
ownership.errUnsupported: This file type is not supported. Upload a PDF, JPG, or PNG file.
ownership.errTooLarge: This file is larger than 10 MB. Choose a smaller file.
ownership.errUpload: We could not upload this file. Your listing draft is still saved. Try again.

verification.disclosureBody: This prototype does not connect to official property or government records.
verification.startBody: We will compare the fictional sample document with the private property information in this listing.
verification.startHelp: You can safely leave after starting. The result will remain available when you return.
verification.pendingBody: The simulated check is reviewing the fictional document and listing details. You can leave this page and return later.
verification.successBody: The fictional document and listing details matched for this demo.
verification.failTitle: The demo details did not match
verification.failBody: The property identifier or location in the fictional document did not match the listing information.

settings.title: Set your price and offer preference
settings.description: Choose the asking price and the lowest offer amount you want to be notified about.
settings.askingHelp: This will be the advertised price when the listing is published in a later step.
settings.minExplanation: Choose the lowest offer amount you want to be notified about. Lower offers may still appear in your offer history, but you will not receive an immediate notification.
settings.demoNote: Offer notifications will be simulated in a later milestone.
settings.visibilityBody: The listing will not appear publicly during this milestone.
settings.errAskingInvalid: Enter a valid whole AED amount greater than zero.
settings.errAskingTooHigh: Asking price must be below AED 1,000,000,000.
settings.errMinAboveAsking: The notification amount cannot be higher than the asking price.

investment.title: Add an Investment Case
investment.description: Share optional purchase-history information and an estimated return summary with future buyers.
investment.privacyNote: Purchase history is optional. You choose whether the calculated Investment Case will appear on the future public listing.
investment.originalHelp: Enter the fictional or demonstration purchase price used for this prototype.
investment.purchaseDateHelp: Used to estimate the annualised return.
investment.renovationHelp: Optional. Include major improvements you want reflected in the estimate.
investment.showOnListing: Show the Investment Case on the future public listing
investment.showHelp: When off, the inputs remain private and the calculated card will not appear publicly.
investment.disclaimer: Estimates are based only on the values entered for this demo. They do not include transaction costs, financing, rental income, taxes, service charges, or market changes.
investment.errAmount: Enter a valid whole AED amount greater than zero.
investment.errDateFuture: Purchase date cannot be in the future.
investment.errNeedAsking: Add an asking price before calculating the Investment Case.

formA.disclosureBody: This prototype does not create or submit a legal Form A.
formA.title: Review the simulated listing agreement
formA.description: Form A is normally used to document the relationship between a property owner and a real-estate brokerage. This prototype shows a simplified, non-legal simulation of that step.
formA.demoStatement: I confirm that the fictional information in this prototype listing is accurate for demonstration purposes and that I understand no legal agreement will be created.
formA.confirm: I confirm the demo listing details above.
formA.successBody: The demo confirmation has been recorded for this listing.
formA.failTitle: We could not complete the Form A simulation
formA.failBody: Your listing details remain saved. Review the information and try again.
formA.errConfirm: Confirm the demo listing details to continue.

photos.title: Add property photographs
photos.description: Upload clear photographs that show the property accurately. Choose the strongest landscape image as the cover.
photos.uploadCta: Drag photographs here, or choose photographs
photos.uploadHint: JPG, PNG or WebP · Up to 20 files · Maximum 12 MB each
photos.coverHelp: The cover photograph will be the first image buyers see after publication.
photos.guidance: Use landscape images where possible. Avoid screenshots, watermarks, contact details, people, or heavily edited photographs.
photos.errUnsupported: This file type is not supported. Upload a JPG, PNG, or WebP image.
photos.errTooLarge: This photograph is larger than 12 MB. Choose a smaller file.
photos.errTooMany: You can upload up to 20 photographs.
photos.errNeedPhoto: Upload at least one property photograph.

permit.disclosureBody: This prototype does not submit information to the official Trakheesi service.
permit.prepareBody: Review the listing information that will be used for this simulated permit step.
permit.confirm: I confirm the demo listing information is ready for the simulated permit step.
permit.submitDialogBody: The prototype will record a demo permit request. No information will be sent to an official government service.
permit.pendingBody: The prototype is processing the simulated Trakheesi application. You can leave this page and return later.
permit.approvedBody: The simulated Trakheesi step is complete. Review the full listing before marking it ready to publish.
permit.failTitle: The demo permit step was not completed
permit.failBody: Review the listing information and try the simulation again. No official application was submitted.
permit.qrHelp: This code is a non-functional demo asset and is not connected to an official permit.
permit.errConfirm: Confirm the demo listing information to continue.

review.title: Review your listing
review.description: Check the property information, demo verification steps, price, and photographs before marking the listing ready to publish.
review.allCompleteBody: Review the information below and confirm when the listing is ready for the next publication stage.
review.itemsBody: Complete the highlighted sections before marking the listing ready.
review.prototypeBody: Ownership verification, Form A, Trakheesi, and permit results in this prototype are simulated. They do not represent official government, legal, or property approval.
review.notPublicBody: Marking the listing ready does not publish it. Publication will be handled in a later product stage.
review.confirmReview: I have reviewed the listing and understand it will remain private until a future publication step.

ready.title: Your listing is ready
ready.description: You have completed the required property details, demo verification steps, photographs, and listing settings.
ready.note: Your listing is not live yet. Review the preview before publishing in the next product stage.
ready.nextStageBody: Publishing the listing will be added in the next product milestone.

preview.bannerBody: Only you can view this draft. The listing is not live.

marketplace.description: Browse clear property information, compare key details, and save homes that interest you.
marketplace.prototypeBody: Property verification and publication review are simulated in this demo.
marketplace.searchPlaceholder: Search by community, area, building, or property type
marketplace.searchTooLong: Search must be 100 characters or fewer.
marketplace.directEmptyBody: Selected external apartments and villas are shown below when available.
marketplace.externalBody: Recent Dubai apartments and villas supplied by BayutAPI. Supported filters are applied to this selection; external listings open on Bayut and cannot be saved or offered on in MARKAZ.

filters.title: Filters
filters.rangeInvalid: The minimum cannot be greater than the maximum.

marketplaceEmpty.resultsBody: Try changing your search, price range, or property details.
marketplaceEmpty.queryBody: No properties match "{query}". Try a different area, building, or property type.

property.directBody: Published directly through MARKAZ. Ownership verification and publication review are simulated in this prototype.
property.copyFailed: We could not copy the link. Select and copy it manually.

save.error: We could not save this property. Try again.
save.authTitle: Sign in to save this property
save.authBody: Save properties to your MARKAZ account and return to them later.
save.unavailableReturn: This property is no longer available, so it was not saved.

saved.title: Saved properties
saved.description: Keep track of properties you may want to revisit.
saved.emptyBody: Save properties while browsing to find them here later.
saved.unavailableTitle: This property is no longer available
saved.unavailableBody: It may have been paused or removed from the marketplace.
saved.partialError: Some saved properties could not be loaded. Try again.
saved.removeError: We could not remove this property from saved items. Try again.

publication.readyBody: Review the public preview, then submit the listing for simulated publication review.
publication.privacy: Ownership documents, unit identifiers, and private verification information will not appear publicly.
publication.checklistBody: We will check that your public listing is complete and that private information is excluded.
publication.checklistComplete: Your listing is ready for publication confirmation.
publication.checklistIncomplete: Complete the items marked "Action required" before publishing.
publication.checkItemPrivacy: Public information checked for private fields
publication.publicLocation: Community, building, and public location details
publication.privateVerification: Verification records and internal review information
publication.confirmBody: Your property will become visible in the MARKAZ marketplace after the simulated review is complete.
publication.confirmPrivacy: Your ownership documents and private verification information will remain private.
publication.confirmBullet2: Approved property photographs will become publicly viewable.
publication.confirmBullet3: The listing may be shared using a public link.
publication.confirmBullet4: You can pause the listing later.
publication.checkbox: I have reviewed the public listing and confirm that the property information and photographs are ready to publish.
publication.checkboxError: Confirm that the public listing is ready to publish.
publication.simBody: This prototype does not perform a real regulatory or legal publication review.
publication.pendingBody: We are preparing the public listing and its photographs. You can leave this page and return later.
publication.approvedBody: The demo review is complete. We are making your listing available in the marketplace.
publication.returnedBody: The simulated publication review could not be completed with the current listing information.
publication.reasonChanged: The listing changed after it was submitted.
publication.reasonPhotos: One or more photographs could not be prepared.
publication.reasonChecklist: A required publication check is no longer complete.
publication.reasonReturned: The demo review returned the listing for changes.
publication.processingErrorBody: Your listing is still private and your saved information is unchanged. Try again shortly.
publication.photoFailure: We could not prepare all property photographs for publication. Your listing is still private.
publication.liveBody: Your property is now visible in the MARKAZ marketplace.
publication.liveSupporting: You can open the public page, copy the listing link, or manage availability from My Listings.
publication.liveSimNote: Publication review was simulated for this prototype.
publication.materialBody: This change affects the published property information. Pause the listing to edit it, then submit it for publication again.

pause.title: Pause this listing?
pause.body: The property will no longer appear in marketplace search or public property pages. You can resume it later.
pause.bullet2: Listing information and photographs are not deleted.
pause.bullet3: The public link will show that the property is unavailable.
pause.pageBody: It is hidden from marketplace results and public property pages. You can resume it when you are ready.
pause.error: We could not pause the listing. It remains live. Try again.

resume.title: Resume this listing?
resume.body: The property will become visible again in marketplace search and through its public link.
resume.reviewRequired: This listing needs publication review before it can become live again.
resume.error: We could not resume the listing. It remains paused. Try again.

investmentCase.title: Investment Case
investmentCase.intro: Seller-provided information and estimated calculations to help explain the property's investment context.
investmentCase.unavailable: Not available from the information provided
investmentCase.disclosure: Investment figures are seller-provided and calculated from the information entered. They are estimates, not financial advice or guaranteed returns.

offers.title: Offers
offers.buyerEmptyTitle: You have not made any offers yet
offers.buyerEmptyBody: Browse properties and make an offer when you find the right home.
offers.sellerDescription: Review and respond to offers across your live listings.
offers.sellerEmptyBody: Offers from interested customers will appear here.
offers.loadError: Some offers could not be loaded. Try again to refresh the list.
offers.resultCount: {count, plural, =0 {No offers} one {# offer} other {# offers}}

cta.underOfferBody: The seller has selected an offer and is not accepting new offers.

form.title: Make an offer
form.description: Enter the amount you would like the seller to consider.
form.expiryHelp: The seller must respond before this proposal expires.

warning.low: This offer is significantly below the asking price. You can still submit it, but the seller may be less likely to respond.
warning.high: This offer is significantly above the asking price. Review the amount before continuing.

review.title: Review your offer
review.description: Check the amount and validity before sending it to the seller.

disclosure.nonBinding: This offer is an expression of interest for this prototype. It does not create a legally binding property agreement.
disclosure.counter: This counteroffer remains part of a non-binding prototype negotiation.
disclosure.accept: This prototype acceptance does not create a legally binding property agreement.

submitted.title: Your offer has been sent
submitted.body: The seller can review, accept, reject, or propose a different amount.

context.otherOffers: The seller may be reviewing other offers.

threshold.help: The threshold controls immediate notifications only. It does not prevent or hide lower offers.

thread.otherAcceptedEvent: Another offer was selected for this property.

counter.description: Enter a new amount for the other party to consider.
counter.equalError: This matches the current proposal. Accept it instead, or enter a different amount.

accept.title: Accept this offer?
accept.body: This will select this buyer's offer and close other active negotiations for the property.
accept.counterBody: You are selecting the seller's proposed amount of {amount}.
accept.week5: Transaction setup will continue in the next stage.
accept.sellerSuccess: This buyer's offer has been selected. The transaction setup will continue in the next stage.
accept.buyerSuccess: The seller's proposal has been accepted. Transaction setup will continue in the next stage.
accept.competing: {count, plural, =0 {No other active offers will be affected.} one {# other active offer will be closed.} other {# other active offers will be closed.}}

reject.title: Reject this offer?
reject.body: This negotiation will close. The buyer will see that the offer was declined.
reject.counterBody: This negotiation will close and the seller will no longer be able to accept your previous proposal.

withdraw.title: Withdraw this offer?
withdraw.body: The seller will no longer be able to accept or respond to this offer.
withdraw.newOffer: You may make a new offer from the property page.

closed.expiredBody: The proposal is no longer available to accept or counter.
closed.otherAcceptedBody: The seller selected another offer, so this negotiation is now closed.
closed.pausedBody: The listing was paused, so this negotiation is now closed.
closed.changedBody: The property details changed, so this negotiation is now closed.

listingView.multipleNote: You can negotiate with more than one buyer, but you can accept only one offer for this property.
listingView.noneBody: Offers from interested customers will appear here.

eligibility.ownListing: This is your listing. Manage offers from My Listings.
eligibility.unavailable: This property is no longer available for offers.
eligibility.underOffer: This property is under offer and is not accepting new offers.
eligibility.activeThread: You already have an active offer
eligibility.activeThreadBody: Continue the existing negotiation to review its latest status or propose a new amount.
eligibility.onboarding: Complete your account setup to make an offer.

auth.title: Sign in to make an offer
auth.body: Create or sign in to your MARKAZ account, then return to this property to continue.

error.notAvailableBody: It may no longer exist, or you may not have permission to view it.
error.staleBody: Another action was completed before yours. We have refreshed the latest status.
error.generic: We could not complete this action. Review the latest offer status and try again.
error.session: Your session has expired. Sign in again to continue.
error.INVALID_AMOUNT: Enter a valid amount in AED.
error.EQUAL_AMOUNT: This matches the current proposal. Accept it instead, or enter a different amount.
error.EXPIRED: This proposal has expired and can no longer be acted on.
error.STALE: This offer has changed. We have refreshed the latest status.
error.ALREADY_ACCEPTED: Another offer has already been accepted for this property.
error.LISTING_UNAVAILABLE: This property is no longer available for offers.
error.LISTING_CHANGED: The property details changed, so this negotiation is now closed.
error.OWN_LISTING: This is your listing. Manage offers from My Listings.
error.GENERIC: We could not complete this action. Review the latest offer status and try again.

realtime.stale: Updates may be delayed. Refresh to check the latest offer status.
realtime.recovered: Offer status is up to date.

validation.zero: Offer amount must be greater than zero.
validation.invalid: Enter a valid amount in AED.
validation.max: Offer amount must be AED 999,999,999 or less.
validation.decimals: Enter the amount in whole dirhams.

announce.counterReceived: Seller counteroffer received. Your response is needed.

notify.title: Notifications
notify.OFFER_RECEIVED: New offer received for your listing.
notify.OFFER_COUNTER_SELLER: The seller proposed a different amount.
notify.OFFER_COUNTER_BUYER: A buyer proposed a different amount.
notify.OFFER_CLOSED_OTHER: The property is now under offer.
notify.OFFER_LISTING_UNAVAILABLE: This offer closed because the listing is no longer available.

transactions.title: Transactions
transactions.subtitle: Track your accepted offers through the simulated transaction process.
transactions.continueBody: Open the shared transaction workspace to track the next steps.

disclosure.title: Transaction process simulated
disclosure.body: This prototype does not process real payments, create legally binding documents, or perform an official property transfer.

empty.title: No transactions yet
empty.body: Transactions appear here after an offer is accepted.

loadError.title: We could not load the transaction

unavailable.title: This transaction is not available
unavailable.body: It may no longer exist, or you may not have permission to view it.

stale.title: This transaction has changed
stale.body: Another action was completed before yours. We have refreshed the latest status.

details.title: Confirm transaction details
details.confirm: I confirm that the property and accepted amount shown are correct for this demo transaction.
details.waitingOther: Waiting for the other participant to confirm.

route.title: How do you plan to purchase this property?
route.help: This selection is used only to shape the prototype transaction checklist.

financing.title: Financing (demo)
financing.disclosure: No mortgage application, bank approval, or credit assessment is performed.

deposit.title: Demo deposit
deposit.body: A demo deposit of 10% of the accepted amount is shown for the prototype. No money will be transferred.
deposit.confirm: I understand that this is a simulated deposit confirmation and no money will be transferred.
deposit.successBody: No real payment has been processed.

documents.title: Documents
documents.noticeBody: Do not upload a real Emirates ID, passport, bank statement, mortgage approval, Title Deed, Oqood, or other sensitive document.
documents.summaryDisclosure: Document review simulated — this is not an official Form F or legally binding agreement.
documents.reviewSummary: Confirm I reviewed the demo summary

checks.title: Demo checks
checks.disclosure: Due-diligence checks simulated — these prototype checks are not legal, financial, structural, title, or regulatory advice.
checks.completedBody: The prototype prerequisites are complete. No legal or regulatory clearance has been performed.

transfer.title: Transfer preparation
transfer.proposeHelp: Choose a preferred date for this prototype. No official appointment will be booked.
transfer.buyerReady: I confirm the buyer tasks are ready for the simulated transfer stage.
transfer.sellerReady: I confirm the seller tasks are ready for the simulated transfer stage.
transfer.appointmentBody: No official appointment has been booked.

completion.title: Completion
completion.confirm: I confirm completion of this transaction in the demo.
completion.waitingOther: Waiting for the other participant to confirm completion in demo.
completion.successBody: This prototype has not processed a real payment or official property transfer.

cancellation.requestBody: The transaction will stop progressing while the cancellation is confirmed or reviewed. The listing will be paused, not republished.
cancellation.pendingBody: A cancellation was requested for this demo transaction.
cancellation.cancelledBody: The transaction has stopped. The listing is paused and will not return to the marketplace automatically.

timeline.title: Timeline
timeline.DETAILS_CONFIRMED: A participant confirmed the transaction details.
timeline.PURCHASE_ROUTE_SELECTED: The buyer selected a purchase route.
timeline.FINANCING_STATUS_UPDATED: The buyer updated the demo financing status.
timeline.DEMO_DEPOSIT_CONFIRMED: The buyer confirmed the demo deposit.
timeline.SUMMARY_REVIEWED: A participant reviewed the demo summary.
timeline.DUE_DILIGENCE_COMPLETED_DEMO: Due diligence was completed in demo.
timeline.TRANSFER_DATE_PROPOSED: A preferred transfer date was proposed.
timeline.COMPLETION_CONFIRMED: A participant confirmed completion in demo.
timeline.COMPLETED_DEMO: The transaction was completed in demo.

notify.TRANSACTION_ACTION_REQUIRED: Your action is required for a transaction.
notify.TRANSACTION_DEPOSIT_CONFIRMED_DEMO: The buyer confirmed the demo deposit.
notify.TRANSACTION_COMPLETED_DEMO: The transaction was completed in demo.
